interaction_phrase: a University of Nottingham spin-out company supported through the National Quantum Technologies
occurrence_sentence: During a visit to Cerca Magnetics, a University of Nottingham spin-out company supported through the National Quantum Technologies Programme, Minister Griffith will outline how this £45 million funding supports the government's vision to transform into a quantum-enabled economy by 2033.
